title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 461.071 - Rights of creditors
text:
461.071.  Rights of creditors. — A deceased owner's creditors, surviving spouse and unmarried minor children shall have the rights set forth in section 461.300 with respect to the value of property passing by nonprobate transfer.
(L. 1989 H.B. 145 § 40, A.L. 1995 S.B. 116)
